violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The gaskets on the walk in cooler and freezer need to be cleaned. The black plastic shelves in the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. The dishwasher is no longer working. The sink system only has two compartments for doing dishes. A three compartment sink or dishwasher must be provided.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken/missing floor tile by the walk in cooler and freezer.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
